description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a minimalist, modern design. The facade is predominantly white with a grid of large, blue-tinted windows arranged in a staggered, asymmetrical pattern across all visible sides. The building sits on a slightly raised, light-colored base and features a flat roof with visible rooftop equipment, including antennas and HVAC units. The windows are uniformly shaped and evenly spaced, contributing to a clean, geometric appearance. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, emphasizing the utilitarian and functional nature of the structure. The entrance appears to be a single, recessed door at the base, typical of commercial office buildings.
description: A tall, white modern office building with blue-tinted windows in a staggered grid and rooftop equipment, set on a light base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a staggered grid of blue windows and a recessed entrance at the base.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar window pattern, but the entrance is less visible and the rooftop equipment is more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with the same window arrangement and clear visibility of the rooftop structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the uniform window grid and the flat roof with equipment.
attribute_window_pattern: Staggered, asymmetrical grid of rectangular windows evenly spaced across all facades.
